overview.Name: Tenax Therapeutics Inc
overview.Description: Tenax Therapeutics, Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company, is dedicated to identifying, developing, and marketing products for cardiovascular and pulmonary disease in the United States and Canada. The company is headquartered in Morrisville, North Carolina.
overview.Address: 101 GLEN LENNOX DRIVE, CHAPEL HILL, NC, UNITED STATES, 27517
